questions.question: Which control should be applied before shipping an IoT device?
questions.description: Unique credentials or secure onboarding reduce compromise from default passwords.

questions.question: Which data should be encrypted when sent from a sensor to the cloud?
questions.description: Sensitive telemetry should be encrypted in transit to protect privacy and integrity.

questions.question: Which inventory field is most useful for IoT patch management?
questions.description: Firmware versions help identify vulnerable devices that need updates.
